features.name: UI guide rewrite
features.description: Rewrite UI guide with monochrome tokens and antipattern guardrails.

features.name: Design tokens CSS
features.description: Update src/index.css CSS variables and Tailwind v4 theme tokens.

features.name: Font loading
features.description: Add self-hosted Pretendard, Geist, and JetBrains Mono font loading.

features.name: Button component
features.description: Implement Button variants, sizes, icons, loading, and interaction states.

features.name: IconButton component
features.description: Implement icon-only button with minimum touch target.

features.name: Chip component
features.description: Implement type, status, and count chip variants with active state.

features.name: Card component
features.description: Implement Card with hoverable option, semantic element support, border, radius, and shadow.

features.name: Input and Textarea components
features.description: Implement input controls with focus and base states.

features.name: Divider and Skeleton components
features.description: Implement divider and skeleton placeholder components.

features.name: EmptyState component
features.description: Implement reusable empty state with title, description, and action.

features.name: Toast component
features.description: Implement toast with auto close and optional undo action.

features.name: BottomSheet component
features.description: Implement mobile bottom sheet with open, close, and drag handle support.

features.name: TopAppBar component
features.description: Implement h-16 sticky top app bar with left, title, and right slots.

features.name: BottomNav component
features.description: Implement mobile fixed BottomNav with Home, New, Folders, and Settings tabs.

features.name: HomePage renewal
features.description: Apply TopAppBar, sticky FilterBar, existing ItemCard feed, BottomNav, and loading, empty, error states.

features.name: MemoCard variant
features.description: Implement memo card variant with type chip, time, headline, and clamped body.

features.name: VideoCard variant
features.description: Implement video card variant with thumbnail, play overlay, type chip, headline, and URL.

features.name: ImageCard variant
features.description: Implement image card variant with image, type chip, headline, and one-line memo.

features.name: ArticleCard variant
features.description: Implement article card variant with type chip, headline, memo, thumbnail, and URL.

features.name: ItemCard type dispatch
features.description: Dispatch from ItemCard to type-specific card components.

features.name: NewItemPage renewal
features.description: Renew new item page with quick option chips, autofocus textarea, and URL detection.

features.name: Web Share Target entry
features.description: Preserve title, text, and url parameter handling with confirmation screen.

features.name: ItemDetailPage renewal
features.description: Renew detail page header, type head area, status toggle, and memo section.

features.name: Delete ConfirmDialog
features.description: Add destructive delete confirmation with navigation and undo toast.

features.name: Swipe status toggle
features.description: Add mobile card swipe status toggle with undo toast.

features.name: Long press BottomSheet
features.description: Add mobile long press bottom sheet for edit, delete, share, and status selection.

features.name: Desktop hover menu
features.description: Show card overflow menu on desktop hover.

features.name: Folders page
features.description: Add folders page with type and status count grid and Home query navigation.

features.name: SettingsPage renewal
features.description: Renew settings page with account, PWA, theme, and data sections.

features.name: LoginPage renewal
features.description: Renew login page with centered card, wordmark, Google OAuth button, and PWA note.

features.name: Landing renewal
features.description: Renew landing page with first viewport intro, explanatory grid, and CTA.

features.name: Antipattern guard automation
features.description: Add script to detect banned CSS patterns.

features.name: Empty Loading Error states
features.description: Ensure major pages provide empty, loading, and error states.

features.name: Dark mode system sync
features.description: Verify prefers-color-scheme sync and light/dark visual regressions.

features.name: Accessibility baseline
features.description: Meet keyboard navigation, focus ring, ARIA, WCAG AA, and touch target requirements.

features.name: PWA and Web Share Target regression
features.description: Verify manifest, build output, mobile install, and share menu behavior.

features.name: SideNav component
features.description: Add desktop SideNav with four menu items, active state, and responsive switch with BottomNav.
